examples.text: عَمَّ يَتَسَاۤءَلُونَ ۝ عَنِ ٱلنَّبَإِ ٱلۡعَظِيمِ ۝ ٱلَّذِي هُمۡ فِيهِ مُخۡتَلِفُونَ ۝
examples.english: About what are they asking one another? / About the great news - / That over which they are in disagreement.

senses.gloss: to be exalted, to be elevated
to inform, to give news, to notify, to bode, to announce

etymology.text: Compare نَبَهَ (nabaha), نَبَعَ (nabaʕa), Hebrew נִבֵּא (nibé, “to prophesy, to proclaim”).
